title: ASR Outdoor 5in Plastic Heavy Duty Gold Snifter Bottle with Nozzle (Various
description:
The ASR Outdoor Gold Snifter Bottles are an ideal tool for all gold prospectors. This handy bottle is perfect for extracting gold from your gold pans. Simple to use, just squeeze the bottle and use the suction to grab nuggets and release them into one of our Glass Vials! Each snifter bottle is 5" tall and holds 10ml of liquid, and can be used for countless hobbies and crafts. Make sure to keep some of these around whether you're gold prospecting, at home, in the office or workshop! Come in packs of 2, 4, 6, 8 or 10 units.

ASR Outdoor 5in Plastic Heavy Duty Gold Snifter Bottle with Nozzle (Various

The ASR Outdoor Gold Snifter Bottles are an ideal tool for all gold prospectors. This handy bottle is perfect for extracting gold from your gold pans.

Key Features

  • Combined Size of Nozzle and Bottle: 5" x 1" Diameter
  • Volume: 3 fl oz
  • Tube Size: 4" x 3/16" Diameter
  • Tube Thickness: 1/32"
  • Ideal for fine gold recovery clean up; strong suction squeeze bottle

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRSB-280
  • UPC: 693944138238
  • Color: Clear
  • Size: 8 Pack

Simple to use, just squeeze the bottle and use the suction to grab nuggets and release them into one of our Glass Vials!

Each snifter bottle is 5" tall and holds 10ml of liquid, and can be used for countless hobbies and crafts. Make sure to keep some of these around whether you're gold prospecting, at home, in the office or workshop!

Come in packs of 2, 4, 6, 8 or 10 units.
